micro_laws: Wake Up 5 Days a Week at 4:30AM
Read/Learn for 1 Hour Per Day - 5 Days a Week
No Phones After 7pm EST - unless a business meeting around the world is a must
No Meetings at the Mansion after 7pm - unless a dinner meeting / event
Invest 1 Hour Per Day with Melanie
Invest 1 Hour Per Day with Lily (when I can.. if only weekends, invest multiple hours!)
Delegate Everything I Don't Need to Do
Always Seek to Learn from Everyone you Come Across No Matter Who They Are or What They Do
NEVER Give a Friend an Opportunity in any of My Companies UNLESS they have proven they can handle it
Be Adamant about the End Result/Goal but FLEXIBLE on How You Get There
